tiers.T2: Whenever you take damage, reduce that damage by your Evasion. Base damage is reduced before bonus damage.
tiers.T3: You are no longer affected by the effects of Fellstrikes you roll.

tiers.T2: Whenever you take damage, reduce that damage by your Durability. Base damage is reduced before bonus damage.
tiers.T3: You are no longer affected by the effects of Fellmarks rolled against you.

tiers.T2: Whenever you take damage, reduce that damage by your Resistance. Base damage is reduced before bonus damage.
tiers.T3: You cannot be targeted by enemy spells that select a specific target. Area effects, runes, hazards, and other non-targeted magical effects may still affect you.

data.name: Ensnared
data.rule: You may not utilize Acts.

data.name: Disoriented
data.rule: Roll 1d6 before each attack. On an odd result, you must target an ally if able.

data.name: Staggered
data.rule: You cannot utilize Reacts.

data.name: Terrorized
data.rule: You cannot voluntarily move closer to the source of this Affliction.

data.name: Frenzied
data.rule: You may only target the source of this Affliction.

data.name: Diminished
data.rule: Your Resistance becomes 0.

data.name: Hunted
data.rule: Fellmarks land against you on a 5 or 6.

data.name: Disrupted
data.rule: Your spells automatically fail unless a Fellmark is rolled.

data.name: Enfeebled
data.rule: Lose half your current Vitality.

data.name: Frozen
data.rule: You may only utilize Skill Rolls.

data.name: Jinxed
data.rule: Your rolls of 1 or 2 count as Fellstrikes.

data.name: Ignited
data.rule: Whenever you utilize an Act, take 1d6 damage.

data.name: Masked
data.rule: You may only see spaces and targets in your space or adjacent spaces.

data.name: Synchronized
data.rule: Each Affliction that afflicts an ally also afflicts you.

data.name: Agonized
data.rule: You cannot attack and your Evasion becomes 0.

data.name: Bleeding
data.rule: Whenever you take damage, take 1 additional Base Damage.

data.name: Accursed
data.rule: You take damage equal to the damage you deal to others.

data.name: Disarmed
data.rule: You cannot utilize your weapon.

data.name: Immobilized
data.rule: You cannot move as part of an Act or React.

data.name: Conjoined
data.rule: Choose a target ally. Any damage dealt to that ally is also dealt to you.

data.name: Impeded
data.rule: Your Evasion becomes 0.

data.name: Mangled
data.rule: Whenever you deal damage, you take your own Base Damage.

data.name: Disenchanted
data.rule: Your weapons lose their Infusions.

data.name: Vulnerable
data.rule: Your Durability becomes 0.

data.name: Harvested
data.rule: Any source that would heal your Vitality deals Base Damage instead.

data.name: Plagued
data.rule: Each Affliction that afflicts an enemy also afflicts you.

data.name: Reapt
data.rule: You no longer gain Charges.

data.name: Strung
data.rule: Each spell that targets an enemy also targets an ally.

data.name: Unclad
data.rule: Your armor loses its Augmentations.

data.name: Unlucky
data.rule: All your rolls become Unlucky.

data.name: Vitiated
data.rule: All Magic damage you deal is halved.

data.name: Bruised
data.rule: Bonus Damage dealt to you counts as Base Damage instead.

data.name: Worn
data.rule: You gain 1 rank of Fatigue.

data.name: Crippled
data.rule: All of your attributes become equal to your lowest attribute.

data.name: Lacerated
data.rule: You cannot utilize attacks.

data.name: Dazzled
data.rule: Your Accuracy is halved.

data.name: Slashed
data.rule: Your maximum Vitality is halved.

data.name: Backlash
data.effect: When an enemy hits or misses you, the attacker takes this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Blighting
data.effect: Add your Magic to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

data.name: Blinking
data.effect: This weapon's Range becomes In Sight.

data.name: Coursing
data.effect: When you successfully cast a spell, each enemy adjacent to you takes this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Devouring
data.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, restore Vitality equal to your Magic.

data.name: Ethereal
data.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Resistance equal to your Magic.

data.name: Forceful
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, push the target one space away from you. If its movement is prevented, deal this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Honed
data.effect: Rolls of 5 also count as Fellmarks with this weapon.

data.name: Potent
data.effect: Add your Magic to this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Unflagging
data.effect: Treat your Fatigue as one rank lower while wielding this weapon.

data.name: Welling
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, charge one additional tier.

data.name: Afflicted
data.effect: When you inflict a Fellmark with this weapon, apply an Affliction of your choice. It replaces the weapon's innate Fellmark Affliction.

data.name: Brutal
data.effect: Add your Power to this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Emboldening
data.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, gain temporary Vitality equal to your Power.

data.name: Goring
data.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore the target's Armor Stance entirely.

data.name: Hooking
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, pull the target one space toward you. If its movement is prevented, deal this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Mauling
data.effect: Add your Power to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

data.name: Merciless
data.effect: Fellmark effects with this weapon are doubled.

data.name: Powerful
data.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Durability equal to your Power.

data.name: Siphoning
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, take one of the target's Charges for yourself.

data.name: Sweeping
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the nearest other enemy takes this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Vengeful
data.effect: When an enemy hits you, deal this weapon's standard damage to it.

data.name: Agile
data.effect: While wielding this weapon, you may move on your Act in addition to your React movement.

data.name: Guarding
data.effect: When an attack targeting you misses, deal this weapon's standard damage to the attacker.

data.name: Hunting
data.effect: Attacks with this weapon are Lucky Rolls.

data.name: Rebounding
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, deal its Base Damage again. The second instance cannot be reduced.

data.name: Reprieve
data.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, remove one Affliction from yourself.

data.name: Rooting
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the target cannot move until the end of the round.

data.name: Sharp
data.effect: Add your Precision to this weapon's Base Damage.

data.name: Swift
data.effect: When you make a standard attack, immediately make one more standard attack against the same target. The extra attack does not trigger this effect again.

data.name: Targeted
data.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Evasion equal to your Precision.

data.name: Vorpal
data.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the target loses two Charges.

data.name: Wounding
data.effect: Add your Precision to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

data.name: Afterimage
data.effect: Your first Evasion roll each round is a Lucky Roll.

data.name: Bulwark
data.effect: Once each round, when an ally within your Mobility range is targeted by an attack, you may make yourself the target instead.

data.name: Deathsong
data.effect: After you take damage, the attacker takes Base damage equal to your highest defensive attribute.

data.name: Driftstep
data.effect: When an attack hits you, you may immediately move one space.

data.name: Echosight
data.effect: You can see through darkness and concealment, and you cannot be hidden from or ambushed.

data.name: Emberhold
data.effect: Each time a hit would reduce you to 0 Vitality, you remain at 1 instead. Each time this happens, there is an even chance you die.

data.name: Hexward
data.effect: The first Affliction applied to you each round is prevented.

data.name: Ironroot
data.effect: Spells and abilities may target you, but they may not target the space you occupy.

data.name: Lastlight
data.effect: While below 25 Vitality, the first attack against you each round misses.

data.name: Mendseam
data.effect: At the start of each round, recover Vitality equal to your highest defensive attribute.

data.name: Mistform
data.effect: Once each round, you may negate one attack against you.

data.name: Nullward
data.effect: Once each round, you may negate one spell that targets you.

data.name: Oakspine
data.effect: You cannot be forcibly moved from your space.

data.name: Phantomfield
data.effect: You may move through enemies, allies, and obstacles. You may not end your movement inside one.

data.name: Runeguard
data.effect: Once each round, when an ally within your Mobility range is hit, reduce the Base Damage they take by your highest defensive attribute.

data.name: Scarweave
data.effect: At the start of each round, gain Temporary Vitality equal to your highest defensive attribute.

data.name: Shadowmeld
data.effect: While wielding this, if you deal no damage this round you become Obscured at the end of the round.

data.name: Threshold
data.effect: No single hit can reduce your Vitality by more than half your current Vitality.

data.name: Treadlight
data.effect: You ignore the movement and damage payloads of Pales you stand in or move through.

data.name: Unbowed
data.effect: The highest Fatigue rank you can reach is 3.
